query: SELECT TABLE_NAME FROM information_schema.TABLES WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE() AND TABLE_NAME IN ('sms_log', 'qa_questions', 'vehicles', 'coupons', 'inspections', 'inspection_items', 'notifications');
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user PAf3reHgcPDAtuw.root --database FqYRztyCVa3fHbrFjU6jAV --execute SELECT TABLE_NAME FROM information_schema.TABLES WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE() AND TABLE_NAME IN ('sms_log', 'qa_questions', 'vehicles', 'coupons', 'inspections', 'inspection_items', 'notifications');
